title: SarkariSaathi
footer_disclaimer: SarkariSaathi provides information based on publicly available government data. Always verify requirements at your local office. This is not legal advice.

chat.welcome_message: Hello. How can I help you today?
chat.limit_guest_body: Login with Google to get 10 questions/day
chat.suggestion_1: How to apply for new Ration Card?
chat.suggestion_3: Lost PAN card — what to do?

whatsapp_message_suffix: Free government guidance. Share with your family.
fee_info_note: The official government fee for this service is
fee_info_warning: Never pay more than this to any agent or middleman.
track_app_desc: Save your application number here. We'll remind you to check the status in 15 days.
fallback_desc_1: We don't have local data for
fallback_desc_2: yet. Showing the standard process for
hero_badge: Free · No Middlemen · In Your Language
how_step_1_desc: Chat with our AI in Hindi or English about what you need.
how_step_2_desc: Receive a personalized guide based on your state and sub-case.
how_step_3_desc: Use our checklist to get all required documents ready.
couldnt_catch: I couldn't quite catch that. Could you please specify your service (Ration, Aadhaar, PAN) and state?
trouble_processing: I'm having trouble processing that query. Please make sure to mention your state.
api_key_missing: Gemini API key is missing. Please add it to .env.local
reminders_subtitle: Track your government application status and follow-ups.
no_reminders_desc: When you save an application number in a service guide, it will appear here for tracking.
privacy_info_desc: These reminders are saved locally in your browser to protect your privacy. SarkariSaathi does not store your application numbers on any server. If you clear your browser history or site data, these reminders will be removed.
official_csc_locator: Or search on official CSC locator
csc_page_title: Find Jan Seva Kendra / CSC Near You
csc_page_desc: CSCs are front-end delivery points for government, social and private sector services of India. They help you with document submission and online applications.
csc_services_list: Ration Card, Aadhaar, PAN Card, Passport, Banking, Insurance, Government Schemes
csc_note: CSC operators charge a small service fee (₹30–₹100). SarkariSaathi is not affiliated with CSC.
offer_guides_desc: Exact steps for Ration Card, Aadhaar & PAN — verified from official government sources
offer_listen_desc: Can't read? Listen to the full guide read aloud in Hindi or English
offer_whatsapp_desc: Share the guide and document checklist directly on WhatsApp with your family
offer_location_desc: Select your state and get exact steps, office addresses and portal links specific to your state
offer_faqs_desc: Most common questions answered in plain Hindi and English — no jargon
offer_tracker_desc: Save your application number and get reminded to check status on time
offer_csc_desc: Find the nearest Jan Seva Kendra where operators can help you apply
offer_languages_desc: Full app in Hindi and English — switch anytime with one tap
